---
title: "Other teaching"
output: 
  html_document:
   toc: false
   logo: images/LogoSULPSM.png
   number_sections: false
   highlight: tango
   css: style.css
   includes:
     before_body: extlogo.html
---

<br>

## Analyzing Ecological Networks

[FRB-CESAB](https://www.fondationbiodiversite.fr/la-fondation/le-cesab/) & ANR ECONET course
